Class VendingMachine

java.lang.Object
VendingMachine
public class VendingMachine extends Object
Simulates a regular vending machine.

This class manages item slots, customer purchases, maintenance operations, cash reserves, and transaction history.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    VendingMachine(int maxQuantity)
    Constructs a vending machine with a specified slot capacity.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    collectCash()
    Collects all money currently stored in the vending machine.
    void

    Displays all available items in the vending machine.

  • Constructor Details

    • VendingMachine

      public VendingMachine(int maxQuantity)
      Constructs a vending machine with a specified slot capacity.

      The machine is initialized with predefined items, an empty cash inventory, and a transaction history.

      Parameters:
      maxQuantity - the maximum number of items each slot can hold

  • Method Details

    • displayItems

      public void displayItems()
      Displays all available items in the vending machine.

      Each item's ID, name, price, calorie count, and remaining stock are shown.

    • purchaseItem

      public void purchaseItem(Scanner scanner)
      Allows a customer to purchase one or more items.

      The customer selects items, inserts payment, receives change when applicable, and the transaction history is updated.

      Parameters:
      scanner - the Scanner object used to receive user input

    • restockItems

      public void restockItems(Scanner scanner)
      Restocks items in the vending machine.

      The operator selects an item and specifies the quantity to be added. The transaction summary is reset after restocking is completed.

      Parameters:
      scanner - the Scanner object used to receive user input

    • setPrices

      public void setPrices(Scanner scanner)
      Updates the prices of items in the vending machine.

      The operator selects an item and specifies a new price. non-negative prices are enforced

      Parameters:
      scanner - the Scanner object used to receive user input

    • replenishCash

      public void replenishCash(Scanner scanner)
      Replenishes the cash reserves of the vending machine.

      The operator selects a denomination and specifies the quantity

      Parameters:
      scanner - the Scanner object used to receive user input

    • displayTransactionSummary

      public void displayTransactionSummary(Scanner scanner)
      Displays the transaction summary menu.

      The operator can view sales summaries and inventory levels since the last restocking.

      Parameters:
      scanner - the Scanner object used to receive user input

    • collectCash

      public void collectCash()
      Collects all money currently stored in the vending machine.

      After collection, the machine's cash reserves are reset to zero, and the total amount collected is displayed.
